response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and a strong track record of building scalable infrastructure and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team measurement frameworks central to the role.
strengths: Extensive 25+ years of hands-on engineering experience across diverse tech stacks and domains.
Proven ability to design and ship scalable systems (e.g., real-time microservices, GIS platforms, CI/CD infrastructure).
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops, tooling, and community initiatives.
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platforms at scale.
Lacks documented experience with AI tools accelerating engineering velocity or bias/risk controls in experimentation.
Minimal emphasis on statistical analysis, metrics governance, or partnering with data science teams on measurable outcomes.
